title: General Availability
description: Prove production-ready GA with product-native GO decisions, multiple real target projects, no high open risks, and active workload stability gates.
architectureCriteria: runtime, adapters, profiles, evidence, reports, and release decisions are versioned contracts
state resume, cleanup, rollback, audit, and observability are productionized
support and compatibility policies are documented
runtimeCriteria: multiple real target projects produce product-native GO decisions
active workload stability proof runs real workload while health, code-change, and pipeline counters advance
LLM, SCM, CI/CD, rollback, approval, and product API boundaries are real where required
releaseCriteria: active stability gate passes without health-only or empty soak evidence
scoped agents and plugins are production-ready
final reports are GO with targetReached=true
